_readme: Corrections applied on top of the Google Sheet every time scripts/fetch-news.js runs.
This file wins over the sheet, so the site can be fixed here without edit access to it.
Titles are matched exactly, ignoring case and extra spaces.
suppress — titles to drop from the site entirely.
images   — replace a row's image with a file committed in this repo.
extra    — posts that are not in the sheet at all. Supports body[] for
paragraphs and gallery[] for extra photos below the body.
Delete an entry to hand control of that post back to the sheet.
suppress: D.D Sports Management Agency is delighted to welcome Ivans Patrikejevs!
D.D Sports Management Agency Welcomes Mashiku Hans Muyeka!
Scouting News: D.D Sports Management Closely Monitoring Chukwuemeka Obioma
Congratulations to Mamelodi Sundowns and Our Client Khuliso Mudau — Sundowns Book Their Spot in the 2025/26 CAF Champions League Final

extra.title: Done Deal! Lindokuhle Zungu Puts Pen to Paper for the Ostriches
extra.excerpt: Lindokuhle Zungu has signed a 1+1 deal with Orapa United in the Botswana Premier Division.
body: Lindokuhle Zungu puts pen to paper for the Ostriches!
Zungu has signed a 1+1 deal with Orapa United in the Botswana Premier Division.
We extend our best wishes to Zungu for a successful season ahead.

extra.title: Project Concluded: Lyema Dopolo Completes His Season with Ongos F.C.
extra.excerpt: Lyema Dopolo closes his season at Ongos F.C. with 18 clean sheets in 30 matches, captaining the side to 4th place in the Namibian Premier Division.
body: Lyema Dopolo has successfully completed his season with Ongos F.C. in the Namibian Premier Division, delivering an exceptional performance that included 18 clean sheets across 30 matches.
He also led the team as captain to a commendable 4th place finish within the Namibian Premier Division.
Lyema's agent, Dontè Dorlly, expressed immense satisfaction with Lyema's consistent performance throughout the season.
It is unfortunate that no awards were presented, as Lyema garnered over 10 Man of the Match accolades. We anticipate a promising future for this talented individual.
Discussions were held with clubs in the Serbian Premier Division and Belgium; however, logistical constraints prevented his timely travel for evaluations.
We are currently engaged in ongoing discussions with interested clubs within Africa and anticipate finalizing a substantive opportunity for him in the near future.
